summary: Frontend UI overhaul testing complete. All key features verified: Landing page with anti-scam messaging, Login page with Google-first layout, Dashboard with wallet breakdown and escrow protection banner, New Transaction 4-step wizard, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: ✅ LANDING PAGE: Text-based logo with Shield icon (no PNG artifacts)
✅ LANDING PAGE: Anti-scam headline 'Buy or sell online without getting scammed'
✅ LANDING PAGE: Anti-scam badge 'Stop getting scammed online'
✅ LANDING PAGE: Trust points (funds release, bank payout 1-2 days, 1.5% fee)
✅ LANDING PAGE: Hero CTA 'Start Secure Transaction'
✅ LANDING PAGE: 'See How It Works' button
✅ LANDING PAGE: Trust badges strip (256-bit Encryption, ID Verified Users, South African Banks, 24hr Dispute Support)
✅ LANDING PAGE: 4-step escrow flow (Create Deal, Buyer Pays, Item Delivered, Funds Released)
✅ LANDING PAGE: 'Why South Africans Trust TrustTrade' section
✅ LANDING PAGE: 'Your Money Is Always Protected' escrow explanation
✅ LANDING PAGE: Footer with TrustTrade logo, links, copyright 2026
✅ LOGIN PAGE: Text-based logo with Shield icon
✅ LOGIN PAGE: 'Secure Escrow for South Africa' tagline
✅ LOGIN PAGE: Google button FIRST (before email form)
✅ LOGIN PAGE: 'or continue with email' divider
✅ LOGIN PAGE: Email/Password form with labels
✅ LOGIN PAGE: 'Protected with 256-bit encryption' footer
✅ LOGIN PAGE: Terms/Privacy links
✅ LOGIN PAGE: Toggle between login/signup modes
✅ DASHBOARD: Text-based navbar logo
✅ DASHBOARD: User name and email display
✅ DASHBOARD: Escrow protection banner 'All transactions protected by TrustTrade Escrow'
✅ DASHBOARD: Payout times displayed (10:00 & 15:00 daily)
✅ DASHBOARD: Compact stats (Active, Pending, Verified, In Escrow)
✅ DASHBOARD: Wallet with Available/In Escrow/Total breakdown
✅ DASHBOARD: 'Bank payout within 1-2 business days after release' message
✅ DASHBOARD: Quick Actions (New Transaction, All Transactions, Disputes)
✅ DASHBOARD: Sidebar navigation (Dashboard, New Transaction, My Transactions, Disputes, Live Activity, My Profile)
✅ DASHBOARD: Escrow explainer section with 4 points
✅ DASHBOARD: Logout button functional
✅ NEW TRANSACTION: 4-step progress indicator (Parties, Item Details, Photos, Confirm)
✅ NEW TRANSACTION: Role selection (Seller/Buyer) with descriptions
✅ NEW TRANSACTION: Auto-filled user details
✅ NEW TRANSACTION: Item description, category, condition fields
✅ NEW TRANSACTION: Delivery method options with auto-release times
✅ NEW TRANSACTION: Fee allocation options (Seller pays, Buyer pays, Split 50/50)
✅ NEW TRANSACTION: Price summary with fee calculation
✅ MOBILE: Landing page responsive - all elements visible
✅ MOBILE: Dashboard responsive - stats, wallet, escrow explainer visible
✅ MOBILE: Bottom navigation bar functional
✅ NAVIGATION: Sidebar links work correctly
✅ NAVIGATION: Logout redirects to landing page

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Clean implementation with text-based logo, anti-scam messaging, trust indicators, and proper data-testid attributes
Wallet breakdown (Available/In Escrow/Total), escrow protection banner with payout times, compact stats grid
4-step wizard with role selection, price summary, fee allocation options
Compact sidebar, text-based logo, mobile bottom navigation
Premium design system with proper color variables, shadow utilities, trust badge styles

test_credentials: Created test users via registration: uitest*, mobile*, navtest*@example.com with password TestPass123!
seed_data_creation: None - used fresh user registrations for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI overhaul complete and verified. Key changes: (1) Text-based logo replaces PNG, (2) Landing page has anti-scam messaging and trust indicators, (3) Dashboard has wallet breakdown with Available/In Escrow/Total, (4) Escrow protection banner shows payout times 10:00 & 15:00, (5) New Transaction is 4-step wizard, (6) Mobile responsive with bottom navigation. All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.
